target: generate-html.js 'Read the long form' link — auto-expand collapsed <details> when navigating via tab switch

patches.description: ISS-1612/1642/1711: 'Read the long form' link onclick — added eg-evaluate auto-expand: after showTab('evaluate'), also sets document.getElementById('eg-evaluate').open=true so the collapsed <details> block is open when the user arrives

tldr_evidence: Three ISSs (1612, 1642, 1711) all flagged that clicking 'Read the long form' switched to the evaluate tab but left the destination <details> collapsed, forcing an extra click. Root cause: showTab() only switches tab, doesn't open the target <details> element.
tldr_verdict: PATCHED — single onclick attribute change covers all three ISSs (same element). Regression test added in test.js (EXP-388 block); all 3616 tests pass.
